Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Powder recycling for electron beam powder bed fusion of TiAl alloy☆

Composition_Info.Note: O content reported as 560 ppm (0.056 at.%).

Process_Text.original: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders produced by EIGA with particle size 53-150 µm. New powders labeled R0. Accelerating voltage 60 kV, layer thickness 50 µm, powder-bed temperature 900-1150 °C, building temperature 900-1100 °C, substrate preheating 1070 °C.
Process_Text.simplified: EIGA-produced Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powder (53-150 µm), EB-PBF R0 virgin state, 60 kV, 50 µm layer.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: EIGA-produced Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders exhibited high sphericity with dendritic microstructure, dark S-segregation enriched in Al, and bright beta segregation enriched in Ti and Cr. Initial powders consisted primarily of gamma and alpha/alpha2 phases (alpha: 69.6%, gamma: 30.4%). Virgin powder exhibited homogeneous alpha-phase structures (TEM).
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Virgin EIGA powder: dendritic microstructure, S-segregation (Al-rich) and beta segregation (Ti/Cr-rich). Phase: alpha+gamma.

Composition_Info.Note: O content reported as 580 ppm (0.058 at.%).

Process_Text.original: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders after first recycling cycle (R1). 1 cycle of EB-PBF thermal exposure (~20 h per cycle). Powder-bed temperature 900-1150 °C.
Process_Text.simplified: EIGA powder after 1 recycling cycle (R1), EB-PBF thermal exposure ~20 h.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: R1 powder: alpha/alpha2-phase gradually decreased compared to R0; interdendritic gamma-region expanded. Small amount of irregular particles observed. Dendritic microstructure persisted with S-segregation and beta segregation.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: R1 powder: reduced alpha/alpha2, expanded gamma interdendritic region. Minor irregular particles. Dendritic structure with S- and beta-segregation.

Composition_Info.Note: O content reported as 660 ppm (0.066 at.%).

Process_Text.original: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders after 5 recycling cycles (R5). Cumulative EB-PBF thermal exposure ~100 h. Powder-bed temperature 900-1150 °C. Minimal Al loss (<0.5 at.%) within 5 cycles.
Process_Text.simplified: EIGA powder after 5 recycling cycles (R5), cumulative exposure ~100 h.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: R5 powder: alpha/alpha2 phase progressively decreased; interdendritic gamma region expanded further. Small irregular particles observed. Dendritic microstructure with S-segregation fading.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: R5 powder: continued alpha reduction, expanded gamma. Minor irregular particles. S-segregation fading.

Properties_Info.Note: Titration analysis; minimal Al loss (<0.5 at.%)

Composition_Info.Note: O content 890 ppm (0.089 at.%). Al depletion 0.05-0.08 at.%/cycle. Oxygen uptake 22 ppm/cycle (0-15 cycles).

Process_Text.original: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders after 15 recycling cycles (R15). Cumulative EB-PBF thermal exposure ~300 h. Powder-bed temperature 900-1150 °C. Over 93% of powders irradiated by EB at 15 cycles. Two types of irregular particles observed: fused satellite particles and semi-melted particles.
Process_Text.simplified: EIGA powder after 15 recycling cycles (R15), cumulative exposure ~300 h, >93% EB-irradiated.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: R15 powder: alpha/alpha2-phase further decreased; interdendritic gamma region expanded. Two distinct types of irregular particles: (1) fused satellite particles adhering to larger counterparts, (2) particles with partial surface melting traces. Distinct oxide layers with Cr enrichment at oxide/matrix interface. Cr-Ti Laves phase 10-20 nm (TEM).
Microstructure_Text.simplified: R15 powder: reduced alpha, expanded gamma. Irregular particles: fused satellites and semi-melted. Cr-Ti Laves phases 10-20 nm. Cr enrichment at oxide/matrix interface.

Properties_Info.Note: Titration analysis; 1.62-2 at.% Al loss at 30 cycles; extrapolated ~1.2 at.% at 15 cycles

Composition_Info.Note: O content 1200 ppm (0.12 at.%). Al loss 1.62-2 at.% at 30 cycles. Significant data fluctuations. Oxygen uptake accelerated to 27.33 ppm/cycle (15-30 cycles). >99.6% powders EB-irradiated.

Process_Text.original: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders after 30 recycling cycles (R30). Cumulative EB-PBF thermal exposure ~600 h. Powder-bed temperature 900-1150 °C. Over 99.6% of powders irradiated with EB at least once. Significant Al loss (1.62-2 at.%). Rod-shaped irregular particles dominated.
Process_Text.simplified: EIGA powder after 30 recycling cycles (R30), cumulative exposure ~600 h, >99.6% EB-irradiated.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: R30 powder: predominantly composed of gamma phase. S-segregation disappeared due to high diffusion rate of Al at 900-1150 °C. Bright dendritic structure (beta segregation) transformed into block-like morphology (alpha2). Distinct oxide layers with Cr enrichment at oxide/matrix interface. Rod-shaped irregular particles dominated. Ti-Nb-Cr precipitates (TEM).
Microstructure_Text.simplified: R30 powder: predominantly gamma phase. S-segregation disappeared. Beta segregation transformed to block-like alpha2. Cr-enriched oxide/matrix interface. Rod-shaped irregular particles. Ti-Nb-Cr precipitates.

Composition_Info.Note: O content 860 ppm (0.086 at.%). Fresh powder mixed (10 kg added before 31st building). New powder fraction ~30.3%. Reduced oxygen and elevated Al compared to R30.

Process_Text.original: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders after mixing with 10 kg fresh powder (R30b). New powder fraction ~30.3%. Oxygen content reduced, Al content elevated compared to R30. Particle size distribution broadened by fresh powder addition.
Process_Text.simplified: Powder mixture after adding 10 kg fresh powder (R30b), new powder fraction ~30.3%.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: R30b powder: three structures observed after fresh powder addition - some particles lost dendritic structure completely showing dispersed bright spots (Cr-enriched, decreased Ti and Al). Broadened particle size distribution.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: R30b: mixed microstructure - some particles lost dendritic structure, Cr-enriched bright spots. Broader PSD from fresh powder.

Properties_Info.Note: Reduced from 1200 ppm after fresh powder addition

Composition_Info.Note: O content 1300 ppm (0.13 at.%). Fresh powder reduced to ~2.4% by 45th cycle. Irregular powder proportion >30%. Oxygen uptake 28 ppm/cycle (>=30 cycles).

Process_Text.original: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders after 45 recycling cycles (R45). Fresh powder fraction ~2.4%. Irregular powder proportion >30%. Semi-molten agglomerates with elongated structures evaded sieving. Oxygen uptake 28 ppm/cycle.
Process_Text.simplified: EIGA powder after 45 recycling cycles (R45), fresh powder ~2.4%, irregular powder >30%.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: R45 powder: semi-molten agglomerates with elongated structures evaded sieving. Irregular particles with Cr-enriched bright aggregates. Powder particles containing aggregated bright spots (Cr-enriched). Increased irregular powder content.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: R45: semi-molten elongated agglomerates, Cr-enriched bright aggregates, >30% irregular particles.

Properties_Info.Note: Titration analysis; achieved 48.12 at.% Al in R45 from low/high-O powder blending

Composition_Info.Note: O content 2000 ppm (0.2 at.%). Al range 42.12-49.52 at.% (extreme variation). Fresh powder 0.04%. 22-28 ppm/cycle oxygen uptake. Surface oxide: Al2O3-dominated (82.11%).

Process_Text.original: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb powders after 70 recycling cycles (R70). Cumulative EB-PBF thermal exposure ~1400 h. Fresh powder fraction 0.04%. Al depletion up to 2 at.% (42.12-49.52 at.% extreme variation). Irregular powder proportion >30%. TiNbCr4 C14 Laves phase 2-3 µm (TEM).
Process_Text.simplified: EIGA powder after 70 recycling cycles (R70), cumulative exposure ~1400 h, fresh powder 0.04%, extreme Al variation.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: R70 powder: gamma dominant (85%). Irregular particles increased significantly. Powder particles with aggregated bright spots (Cr-enriched). Non-uniform microstructure due to varying Al loss during melting - lamellar agglomerates (alpha2+gamma) in Al-poor areas. TiNbCr4 C14 Laves phase 2-3 µm. Ti/O-rich regions at particle edges despite lack of continuous oxide films. Progressive gamma-phase coarsening. Surface oxide shifted to Al2O3-dominated (82.11%).
Microstructure_Text.simplified: R70: gamma 85%, semi-molten elongated agglomerates, Cr-enriched aggregates, >30% irregular particles, TiNbCr4 C14 Laves 2-3 µm, Al2O3-dominated surface (82.11%).

Properties_Info.Note: Titration analysis; extreme variation (42.12-49.52 at.%); reflects heterogeneous irradiation histories

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: XPS surface oxide fraction after 70 cycles

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); titration (Al); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: O content 680 ppm. Thin-walled sample built from R0 (new) powder. Phases: gamma and alpha2 with beta0/B2 precipitates between lamellar colonies and gamma grain boundaries.

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb sample S0 built from R0 (new) powder by EB-PBF. Layer thickness 50 µm, accelerating voltage 60 kV, building temperature 900-1100 °C, substrate preheating 1070 °C, powder-bed temperature 900-1150 °C. Hatching strategy, line offset 0.1 mm. EA range 1.80-2.24 J/mm2. Dual-phase structure: lamellar colonies (alpha2+gamma) and equiaxed gamma grains.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled sample from R0 powder, 50 µm layer, 60 kV, dual-phase gamma+alpha2 with beta0/B2 precipitates.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: S0 thin-walled sample: dual-phase structure of lamellar colonies (alpha2+gamma) and equiaxed gamma grains. Cubic beta0/B2 phase between lamellar colonies and gamma grain boundaries. Sub-micron beta0/B2 precipitates (TEM). C15 Laves phase (Cr1.93Ti1.07) identified by TEM diffraction (3.2 vol%). Pronounced gamma bands with annealed twins. KAM up to 4.97. LAGB 5.2%, twin boundaries 12.5%.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: S0: dual-phase lamellar (alpha2+gamma) + equiaxed gamma. beta0/B2 at grain boundaries. C15 Laves 3.2 vol%. Pronounced gamma bands, twins. KAM 4.97.

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT; strain rate 1e-4 s^-1; specimen: 12 mm gauge, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Highest plasticity in S0-S15 range; tensile range 682-750 MPa

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); titration (Al); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: O content 680 ppm. Thin-walled sample built from R5 powder. Phases: gamma and alpha2 with characteristic gamma bands.

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb sample S5 built from R5 (5-cycle recycled) powder by EB-PBF. Layer thickness 50 µm, accelerating voltage 60 kV, building temperature 900-1100 °C. Pronounced gamma bands with annealed twins similar to S0.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled sample from R5 powder, 50 µm layer, gamma+alpha2 with beta0/B2.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: S5: equiaxed gamma grains, fine lamellar colonies (alpha2+gamma), dispersed bright spots (beta0/B2) at colony boundaries. Pronounced gamma bands with annealed twins. Microstructure similar to S0 but with slightly elevated beta0/B2.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: S5: dual-phase lamellar+gamma, beta0/B2 at boundaries, gamma bands. Similar to S0 with slightly more beta0/B2.

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); titration (Al); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: O content 730 ppm. Thin-walled sample built from R10 powder. Phases: gamma and alpha2 with distinct gamma bands.

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb sample S10 built from R10 (10-cycle recycled) powder by EB-PBF. Layer thickness 50 µm, accelerating voltage 60 kV, building temperature 900-1100 °C. Distinct gamma bands with annealed twins.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled sample from R10 powder, 50 µm layer, gamma+alpha2 with beta0/B2.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: S10: equiaxed gamma grains, fine lamellar colonies (alpha2+gamma), dispersed bright spots (beta0/B2) at colony boundaries. Distinct gamma bands with annealed twins. Similar to S0 and S5.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: S10: dual-phase lamellar+gamma, beta0/B2 at boundaries, distinct gamma bands.

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); titration (Al); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: O content 740 ppm. Thin-walled sample built from R15 powder. Highest plasticity among all samples. Pronounced lamellar clusters. gamma bands NOT visible.

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb sample S15 built from R15 (15-cycle recycled) powder by EB-PBF. Layer thickness 50 µm, accelerating voltage 60 kV, building temperature 900-1100 °C. More pronounced lamellar clusters. gamma bands NOT visible in EBSD. Highest plasticity.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled sample from R15 powder, 50 µm layer, gamma+alpha2 with C15 Laves and increased beta0/B2.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: S15: dual-phase structure (lamellar colonies + equiaxed gamma). More pronounced lamellar clusters. gamma bands NOT visible in EBSD. beta0/B2 phase increased at colony boundaries. C15 Laves phase (Cr1.93Ti1.07) from TEM - Ti and Cr predominant, no significant Al/Nb enrichment, dispersed around boundaries and within alpha2 regions. Grain size <=10 µm uniform. KAM max 4.99. LAGB 7.4%. Grain size uniformity excellent.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: S15: dual-phase lamellar+gamma, pronounced lamellar clusters, NO gamma bands, C15 Laves dispersed in boundaries/alpha2. Grain <=10 µm. KAM 4.99.

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT; strain rate 1e-4 s^-1; specimen: 12 mm gauge, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Highest plasticity among all samples; highest ductility

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); titration (Al); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: O content 860 ppm (±10). Thin-walled sample built from R30 powder. beta0/B2 phase peaks appeared prominently in XRD.

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb sample S30 built from R30 (30-cycle recycled) powder by EB-PBF. Layer thickness 50 µm, accelerating voltage 60 kV, building temperature 900-1100 °C. beta0/B2 phase content increased; appeared in both lamellar colonies and gamma bulk.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled sample from R30 powder, 50 µm layer, increased beta0/B2 and C14 Laves.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: S30: equiaxed gamma grains, fine lamellar colonies (alpha2+gamma), dispersed bright spots (beta0/B2) at colony boundaries and in gamma bulk. beta0/B2 grew from point-like to irregular agglomerations. C14 Laves phase peaks appeared in XRD (observed in BSE duplex region). gamma bands pronounced in EBSD.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: S30: dual-phase, beta0/B2 increased and in gamma bulk. C14 Laves in BSE. gamma bands pronounced.

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); titration (Al); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: O content 760 ppm (±15). Thin-walled sample built from R30b (fresh powder mixed) powder. gamma band reappeared. Reduced beta0/B2 content after fresh powder addition.

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb sample S30b built from R30b (fresh powder mixed, ~30.3% new powder) powder by EB-PBF. Layer thickness 50 µm, accelerating voltage 60 kV. gamma band reappeared. beta0/B2 content reduced compared to S30. More pronounced lamellar clusters.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled sample from R30b powder (30.3% fresh), gamma band reappeared, reduced beta0/B2.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: S30b: dual-phase structure. gamma band reappeared in thin-wall microstructure. beta0/B2 content reduced compared to S30 after fresh powder addition. More pronounced lamellar clusters.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: S30b: dual-phase, gamma band reappeared, reduced beta0/B2, lamellar clusters.

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); titration (Al); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: O content 900 ppm. Thin-walled sample built from R45 powder. gamma bands barely visible. Spheroidized beta0/B2 phase increased.

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb sample S45 built from R45 (45-cycle recycled) powder by EB-PBF. Layer thickness 50 µm, accelerating voltage 60 kV, building temperature 900-1100 °C. gamma bands barely visible. Spheroidized and agglomerated beta0/B2 phase increased.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled sample from R45 powder, 50 µm layer, gamma bands barely visible, spheroidized beta0/B2.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: S45: gamma bands barely visible. Spheroidized and agglomerated beta0/B2 phase increased content. More pronounced lamellar clusters compared to S30b. C14 Laves phase from XRD/BSE.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: S45: gamma bands barely visible, spheroidized beta0/B2, increased C14 Laves.

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); titration (Al); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: O content 940 ppm (±40). Thin-walled sample built from R70 powder. Highest UTS (750 MPa). Ductility reduced by 40% (2.1%-0.8%). beta0/B2 content 4.6%. Over 60% grains <5 µm. Twin boundary decreased to 5.61%.

Process_Text.original: Thin-walled Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb sample S70 built from R70 (70-cycle recycled) powder by EB-PBF. Layer thickness 50 µm, accelerating voltage 60 kV, building temperature 900-1100 °C. Highest UTS (750 MPa). Grain refinement (average <10 µm, over 60% <5 µm) from heterogeneous nucleation. Ductility reduced by 40% (2.1%-0.8%) due to combined effects of irregular powder content and oxygen contamination (>2000 ppm in powder). Two parallel specimens experienced brittle fracture.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF thin-walled sample from R70 powder, 50 µm layer, highest UTS (750 MPa), grain refinement <10 µm (60% <5 µm), 4.6% beta0/B2, brittle fracture.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co.

Microstructure_Text.original: S70: equiaxed gamma grains, fine lamellar colonies (alpha2+gamma), spheroidized and agglomerated beta0/B2 (4.6 vol%) at colony boundaries and in gamma bulk. TiNbCr4 C14 Laves phase 2-3 µm (TEM). Grain refinement: average <10 µm, over 60% of grains <5 µm. Grain size uniformity excellent. LAGB 8.15%. gamma bands NOT visible. Twin boundaries decreased to 5.61%. Increased surface roughness with more fusion lines and abnormal convex points.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: S70: fine grains (<10 µm avg, 60% <5 µm), 4.6% beta0/B2, TiNbCr4 C14 Laves 2-3 µm, spheroidized beta0/B2 in gamma bulk, no gamma bands, 8.15% LAGB, twin boundaries 5.61%.

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT; strain rate 1e-4 s^-1; specimen: 12 mm gauge, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Highest UTS among all samples; brittle fracture observed in two parallel specimens due to high oxygen (>2000 ppm) and irregular powder content
60% reduction from initial ductility (2.1%); brittle fracture in high-oxygen specimens
From 2.1% to 0.8%; attributed to combined effects of irregular powder content and oxygen contamination (>2000 ppm in powder)
Lower than powder O content due to evaporation during EB-PBF
